name: Cookie Survivors
short_description: Survive against monsters to get the legendary cookie! Cookie Survivors is a top-down roguelite game. Combine various items to grow stronger until you get the legendary cookie!
detailed_description:
About This Game

The girls have arrived on the mysterious island to get the legendary cookie.

The legendary cookie is hidden deep within, guarded by terrifying monsters.

Fortunately, the island is home to powerful items that can enhance their abilities, allowing the girls to grow stronger.

Features

  • There are 27 characters and 101 items available.

  • Achieve 87 achievements.

  • Collect coins to purchase items.

  • Combine items to become stronger.

Controls

Move using the W, A, S, and D keys. Attack using the arrow keys.
